design_philosophy: Retro-Futurism meets Cyber-Athleticism. High contrast, aggressive layout, zero decorative blobs. The UI must feel like a terminal command center built for gamers.

three_d_scene.critical_rule: NO GREEN BLOBS. NO GRADIENT ORBS. Background must be strictly atmospheric space and wireframes.

wireframe_sphere.animation: Slow, constant rotation on Y and X axes

button.primary: bg-[#53FC18] text-black font-heading font-bold rounded-none px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#42cc13] transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(83,252,24,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(83,252,24,0.6)]
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#53FC18] text-[#53FC18] font-heading font-bold rounded-none px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#53FC18]/10 transition-all duration-200

input.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-none px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#53FC18] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#53FC18] focus:outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-white/20 font-body

kick_iframe_card.wrapper: relative w-full aspect-video bg-black border border-white/10 group-hover:border-[#53FC18]/40 transition-colors
kick_iframe_card.overlay_actions: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full p-4 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 to-transparent flex justify-between items-end

modal_gate.content: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#53FC18]/30 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(83,252,24,0.1)] p-8 max-w-md w-full rounded-none

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Strict adherence to Next.js/React + Vite/FastAPI setup as required by the backend system. Ensure the frontend is built using standard React/Vite.
2. All files are in .js/jsx. Do NOT use TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).
3. Use standard Tailwind classes for all styling. Rely on raw HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts to allow high asymmetry and custom 'retro-futuristic' grids.
4. For the R3F Scene: Make sure to wrap it in a pointer-events-none fixed container so it doesn't block UI interactions. Use 'Stars' and 'Sphere' from '@react-three/drei'.

5. CRITICAL: Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for the main visual elements if they force rounded corners. Use raw divs with border-radius: 0 to maintain the aggressive gaming UI aesthetic. You can use Shadcn for standard form inputs/dialogs but heavy customization is required to remove the default rounded look.
6. Include framer-motion strictly on direct children of layout wrappers.
7. Do NOT include ANY image placeholders, dummy images, or external images. The R3F 3D background is the sole visual anchor.
8. Implement every single data-testid string provided above in the final JSX elements.
9. Use lucide-react for icons, specifically targeting high-tech/gaming style icons (e.g., Terminal, Crosshair, Zap, Gamepad).
